channel.title: Trendlyne Latest Market News
channel.description: Latest stock market insights and analyst calls from Trendlyne.

item.title: Rising energy costs test India’s growth outlook
item.description:
“A rare ‘Goldilocks’ phase of high growth and low inflation.” That is how Reserve Bank of India Governor Sanjay Malhotra described the Indian economy at the December policy meeting. Interest rates wer...

Premium: No

item.title: Market closes higher as Trump suggests war will end in 'two to three weeks'
item.description:
Nifty 50 closed at 22,679.40 (348, 1.6%), BSE Sensex closed at 73,134.32 (1,186.8, 1.7%) while the broader Nifty 500 closed at 20,935.15 (407.1, 2.0%). Market breadth is highly positive. Of the 2,776 ...

Premium: No

item.title: Five stocks to buy from analysts this week - March 31, 2026
item.description:
1. Uno Minda: Axis Direct upgrades this auto parts producer to a ‘Buy’ rating from ‘Hold’, with a target price of Rs 1,260 per share, a 22.1% upside. The impact of the US-Iran war is negative for the...

Premium: No

item.title: IPOs queue up despite recent muted debuts
item.description:
The market plunged on March 30, with the Nifty 50 closing 2.1% lower. The sell-off was triggered by a fresh escalation in the Middle East after Yemen’s Houthi rebels officially joined the conflict, la...

Premium: No

item.title: Five Interesting Stocks Today - March 27, 2026
item.description:
1. Maruti Suzuki: This car company rose 2% on March 25 after announcing plans to invest Rs 10,189 crore in a new Gujarat plant with an annual capacity of 2.5 lakh units. The company currently operate...

Premium: No

item.title: In a volatile market, FPIs pick sectors showing results over promise
item.description:
As volatility soars, the Indian stock market has become a game of musical chairs, where global investors are crowding into a few select sectors before the music stops. Over the past year, this rotati...

Premium: No

item.title: Between Swiggy and Zomato, Swiggy takes the dark patterns crown
item.description:
They are two companies with fundamentally nonsensical names, and we use them nearly everyday. People say 'Swiggy it' like they used to say 'Kodak moment'. These two listed companies, Swiggy and Zomato...

Premium: No

item.title: Five stocks to buy from analysts this week - March 24, 2026
item.description:
1. V-Guard Industries: Geojit BNP Paribas upgrades this electrical appliance manufacturer to a ‘Buy’ call, with a target price of Rs 392 per share, an upside of 20.7%. The Israel–Iran war negatively i...

item.title: IPO rush: Fresh issues line up despite recent weak market debuts
item.description:
The Nifty 50 fell sharply on Monday, declining 2.6%, as rising geopolitical tensions weighed on market sentiment. The drop follows an ultimatum from US President Donald Trump, who threatened Iran with...

Premium: No

item.title: Five Interesting Stocks Today - March 20, 2026
item.description:
1. Va Tech Wabag: This water technology company rose 2.2% on March 12 after it won a contract worth over Rs 1,000 crore from Chennai's water board. The project will upgrade and run a 45 million litre...
